title: Unresolved Pre-Go-Live Register

open_watch_items.observation: Homepage shows internal/developer-facing copy: UI Step 3 Integration.
open_watch_items.treatment: Must be replaced or consciously approved as public-facing copy before go-live.

open_watch_items.observation: Sports Desk cards show Loading / Fetching placeholder states.
open_watch_items.treatment: Must resolve with stable fallback, hide module, or mark as prepared surface before go-live.

open_watch_items.observation: Updated logic requires 10 daily signals by default, split as 6 India and 4 International.
open_watch_items.treatment: AG56.8 must check that Daily Signal / First Light logic reflects this rule or carries a clear deferral.

open_watch_items.observation: Homepage must align to Discover → Read → Reflect, not internal staging language.
open_watch_items.treatment: AG56.8 must check public homepage copy against AG45 doctrine.

open_watch_items.observation: Word/Panchang/Reflection/Vedic preview must avoid invented mantra, unsupported claims, deterministic astrology or live calculation claims.
open_watch_items.treatment: AG56.8 must consume AG56.6 safety boundary and decide if current preview posture is acceptable.

decision_rule: AG56.8 must decide GO, CONDITIONAL_GO, or DEFER based on these watch items. AG56.7 itself does not decide go-live.
